name: Sofia Garcia
background: 34-year-old relocating with spouse and a dog. Needs space, stability, and pet-friendly policies. Detail-oriented, reads the fine print, asks follow-up questions.
special_needs: pet-friendly, ground floor or elevator building, in-unit laundry

sample_questions: Hi, my husband and I are looking for a 2-bedroom and we have a dog — a 65lb lab mix. Are you pet friendly?
What are the pet fees and deposits? Is there a weight limit?
Do you have any 2BRs available in the next 45 days?

conversation_arc.intent: Probe on lease terms and specifics
sample_questions: Is the pet deposit refundable at move-out?
We'd really prefer ground floor or a building with an elevator — is that something you can accommodate?
What happens if we need to break the lease early? My husband's job could require relocation.

conversation_arc.intent: Request human contact for lease detail questions
sample_questions: There's a lot to think through here and I want to make sure I understand the lease terms fully before we visit. Can someone from your team reach out to me directly?
